tasks.label: Build OpenGL
args: clang++ main.cpp -std=c++17 -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION -g -Iinclude -I$(brew --prefix glew)/include -I$(brew --prefix glfw)/include -I$(brew --prefix glm)/include -L$(brew --prefix glew)/lib -L$(brew --prefix glfw)/lib -lGLEW -lglfw -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -o app
